title: Production Agent Loop and Goal Capstone · Control-Loop Lens: Eval Release
summary: Build a safe goal-driven agent for a realistic repository or operations task. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops eval release increment in a production-ready agent-loop reference implementation. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Gate release on scenario, trajectory, security, and recovery evidence.
Integrate permissions, idempotency, stop controls, and fault recovery.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
